# vigame

> An open-source game engine built for AI agents. Build games by generating VGX (vigame XML) scenes. Rendered via three.js (3D) or Phaser (2D). Full MCP server for live AI-to-game control.

## Key Concepts

**VGX format** ‚Äî Declare your entire game scene in XML. AI generates this reliably.
**ECS** ‚Äî Entity-Component-System architecture. Everything is data + logic.
**MCP server** ‚Äî AI agents control running games via 8 MCP tools.
**Plugins** ‚Äî Engine is fully plugin-based. Renderer, physics, input, gameplay are all plugins.

## Quick Start

```xml
<world renderer="three">
  <config gravity="0 -9.81 0" clear-color="#87ceeb" />
  <entity name="Player" tag="player">
    <transform pos="0 2 0" />
    <mesh shape="capsule" color="#ff6b35" />
    <health current="100" max="100" />
  </entity>
  <entity name="Ground">
    <transform pos="0 -0.5 0" />
    <mesh shape="box" size="50 1 50" color="#4a7c59" />
    <rigid-body type="static" />
  </entity>
</world>
```

## Packages

- `@vigame/core` ‚Äî ECS world, entities, components, systems, plugins, events
- `@vigame/scene` ‚Äî VGX parser, serializer, hydrator
- `@vigame/renderer-three` ‚Äî three.js 3D renderer plugin
- `@vigame/input` ‚Äî keyboard/mouse input plugin
- `@vigame/physics` ‚Äî Rapier 3D physics plugin
- `@vigame/gameplay` ‚Äî health, inventory, score, collectibles
- `@vigame/mcp` ‚Äî MCP server + WebSocket bridge

## MCP Tools (for AI agents)

- `scene` ‚Äî load/save/clear/info
- `entity` ‚Äî create/delete/find/list/rename
- `component` ‚Äî add/remove/set/get/list_available
- `transform` ‚Äî set_position/set_rotation/set_scale/look_at
- `query` ‚Äî by_component/by_tag/by_name/all
- `runtime` ‚Äî play/pause/step/stop/reset
- `inspect` ‚Äî screenshot/world_state/schemas/systems
- `vgx` ‚Äî parse/serialize/validate/patch

## Configure MCP (Claude Code)

Add to your `.claude/settings.json`:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "vigame": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["vigame-mcp"],
      "env": { "VIGAME_BRIDGE_PORT": "7777" }
    }
  }
}
```

Then run your game with `VigameBridgePlugin()` registered, and the AI can control it live.

## VGX Tag Reference

### World attributes
- `renderer` ‚Äî "three" (3D) or "phaser" (2D)

### Config
- `gravity` ‚Äî "x y z" (default: "0 -9.81 0")
- `clear-color` ‚Äî hex color

### Transform (3D)
- `pos` ‚Äî "x y z" (position)
- `rot` ‚Äî "x y z" rotation in degrees (shorthand vector form)
- `rx`, `ry`, `rz` ‚Äî rotation in degrees per axis (alternative to `rot`)
- `scale` ‚Äî "x y z" scale (shorthand vector form)
- `sx`, `sy`, `sz` ‚Äî scale per axis (alternative to `scale`; default: 1)

### Mesh
- `shape` ‚Äî box | sphere | capsule | cylinder | cone | plane | torus
- `color` ‚Äî hex color
- `size` ‚Äî varies by shape
- `wireframe` ‚Äî true/false
- `cast-shadow` ‚Äî true/false

### RigidBody
- `type` ‚Äî dynamic | static | kinematic-position | kinematic-velocity
- `mass` ‚Äî number
- `gravity-scale` ‚Äî number

### Health
- `current` ‚Äî number (default: 100)
- `max` ‚Äî number (default: 100)
- `regen-rate` ‚Äî HP/second (default: 0)

### Collectible
- `type` ‚Äî string (e.g. "coin", "powerup")
- `value` ‚Äî number
